steps.title: Identify the sentence structure
steps.content: The first part of the sentence describes an accomplishment: cultivating a community of Black creatives. The second part describes another accomplishment: garnering a reputation as a hub. The passage presents these as connected—they happen in sequence with a logical link.

steps.title: Pick the word for logical sequence
steps.content: Accordingly connects two facts where the second follows from the first—when you cultivate a creative community, you accordingly earn a reputation for being a cultural hub. Nevertheless and On the other hand both introduce contradiction (absent here), while Periodically addresses timing and is unrelated to how these accomplishments connect. That matches choice B — B is correct.
